creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 243989
Patch for config.site

This causes inconsistent behaviour as 12.4 ships without byteswap.h while 13.2 and newer do. As much as I don't want to spend more time in configure stage I don't see another way without breaking it either for 12.4 or everything else.

See https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=272812#c0 for more informaiton
